data.title: As BlueSky Surges, Could Trump Sell His Truth Social Shares Ahead of Inauguration?
data.description: Trump Media faces fierce competition in social media industry from giants like Facebook and Twitter. Trump has shot down talk of selling his stake in Truth Social before his inauguration.
